name: Cerebral Infarction
definition: Cerebral tissue ischemia, hypoxia, and necrosis due to impaired blood supply
etiology: Atherosclerosis, cardiogenic embolism, small artery disease
symptoms: Hemiplegia, aphasia, sensory disturbance, ataxia, consciousness disturbance
treatment_principles: Thrombolytic therapy, antiplatelet aggregation, improve cerebral circulation, neuroprotection, rehabilitation therapy
prevention_advice: Control blood pressure, glucose, and lipids, quit smoking and limit alcohol, moderate exercise, regular physical examinations
